title: Professionals
noProfessionals: There are no professionals registered for this clinic yet.
name: Name
deleteConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this doctor?
deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will delete the doctor and all scheduled appointments.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.label: Profile
profile.description: The profile determines the permissions and features available to this user.
profile.doctorWarning: Professionals with "Healthcare Professional" profile must have at least one specialty registered.

specialties.title: Specialties
specialties.requiredWarning: Professionals with 'Doctor' profile must have at least one specialty. Click 'Add Specialty' to start.

professional.availabilityDescription: Select the days of the week and configure service hours for each day.

access.createAccountDescription: Check this option if you want to create a login account for the professional.
access.accessTypeDescription: You can change the login type between username and email.
access.usernameInfoDescription: Set a unique username for the professional's login.
access.usernamePlaceholder: Enter a username (e.g., hugo.almeida) or use the generated one
access.usernameDescription: This username will be used along with the password to log in. You can customize or generate automatically.
access.usernameDescriptionEdit: This username will be used along with the password to log in.
access.accountInfoDescriptionNew: A login account will be created for the professional using the email entered in the personal data tab.
access.accountInfoDescriptionEdit: The professional's email will be used for login.
access.emailAccessDescriptionNew: This email will be synchronized with the email entered in the personal data tab.
access.emailAccessDescriptionEdit: This email will be used to log in.
access.passwordPlaceholder: Click generate or enter a password
access.passwordDescription: Password will be automatically generated (8 alphanumeric characters) if left blank.
access.newPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current password
access.newPasswordDescription: Enter a new password to change or leave blank to keep current.

toast.errorSaving: Error saving professional. Please try again.
toast.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields.
toast.completeAllSteps: Please complete all steps before saving.
toast.featureDisabled: Feature disabled, will be available soon!

validation.availabilityRequired: There must be availability configured for all 7 days of the week.
validation.timesRequiredWhenAvailable: Times are required when the day is available and end time must be after start time.
validation.specialtiesRequiredForDoctor: At least one specialty is required for professionals with Healthcare Professional profile.
validation.passwordRequiredWhenCreatingAccount: Password is required when create account is checked.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation.percentageRequiredWhenType: Percentage is required when type is percentage.
validation.fixedAmountRequiredWhenType: Fixed amount is required when type is fixed.
validation.percentageRequiredWhenTypePlus: Percentage is required when type is percentage + fixed.
validation.fixedAmountRequiredWhenTypePlus: Fixed amount is required when type is percentage + fixed.
validation.atLeastOneDayAvailable: At least one day of the week must be available.
validation.timesRequiredWhenDayAvailable: Times are required when the day is available.
validation.endTimeMustBeAfterStart: End time must be after start time.

metadata.title: Professionals
metadata.keywords: appointment scheduling, online appointment scheduling, clinic management, online clinic management, electronic medical records, healthcare professional schedule control, patient schedule control
